import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        if neg
          sum = sum - cur
        else
          sum = sum + cur
        end
        count = count + 1
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
      has = true
    else if b == 43 and not has
      has = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      sum = sum - cur
    else
      sum = sum + cur
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if count == 0
    Err("no input")
  else
    let avg = sum / count
    print("avg=#{avg}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
